# 🧿 Nazar Agent — MEMORY.md
# The agent writes durable facts here for cross-session recall.
# This file grows as the agent learns about you.
# Do not edit manually unless you want to correct or prune memory.

---

## How Memory Works
- Memory is stored as declarative facts: preferences, environment details, conventions
- The agent adds memories proactively when it learns something durable
- You can ask the agent to "remember this" or "forget that"
- Memories persist across sessions and are injected into every conversation start
